task_completion.description: Verify the 'Blog Categories' vocabulary and its terms are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Drupal Taxonomy page showing a vocabulary named 'Blog Categories' (machine name: blog_categories) containing the terms 'Product News', 'Deals & Offers', and 'Tech Tips'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Store Blog Post' content type is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Drupal Content Types list page showing 'Store Blog Post' with the machine name 'store_blog_post'.

task_completion.description: Verify the required entity reference fields are added to the 'Store Blog Post' content type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Manage fields' page of the 'Store Blog Post' content type. It should list 'Featured Product' (machine name: field_featured_product) referencing Commerce Products, and 'Blog Category' (machine name: field_blog_category) referencing Taxonomy terms.

task_completion.description: Verify the sample blog post is created and published with the correct references.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the node view or edit page showing a published post titled 'Top 5 Headphones for 2024'. It must show 'Product News' selected for the category field and 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' selected for the featured product field.

task_completion.description: Verify the View page is configured and accessible at /store-blog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the frontend page at the URL path '/store-blog' displaying the 'Top 5 Headphones for 2024' blog post, or the Views configuration UI showing a Page display with the path '/store-blog' filtering for 'Store Blog Post' content.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Drupal admin UI rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Drupal web interface (e.g., Structure, Content, Views menus) rather than a terminal window executing 'drush' or 'mysql' commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual web application in a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should be visible showing the local Drupal environment URL, and the interface should match the standard Drupal admin theme (Claro/Seven) or frontend theme.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the CMS by inserting records directly into the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of database management tools (like phpMyAdmin, Adminer, or SQL CLI) in the screenshots. All entity creation should happen via Drupal forms.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The vocabulary machine name must be 'blog_categories' with exactly three terms: 'Product News', 'Deals & Offers', and 'Tech Tips'. The content type machine name must be 'store_blog_post' with entity reference fields 'field_featured_product' and 'field_blog_category'. The sample post must be titled 'Top 5 Headphones for 2024', categorized under 'Product News', and reference the product 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' (SKU: SONY-WH1000XM5). The view must be configured with the page path '/store-blog'.
